title: Tunisian Pepper Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry featuring tunisian peppers and your choice of protein. Serve over rice or with some crusty bread.

ingredients.name: stir-fry sauce
ingredients.notes: or make your own with soy sauce and rice vinegar

ingredients.name: protein of your choice (chicken, beef, tofu)

instructions: Heat the velvety olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the thinly sliced onion and cook for 3-4 minutes.
Add the tunisian peppers and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Add the protein of your choice and cook until browned and cooked through.
Stir in the tangy tahini and stir-fry sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve over rice or with some crusty bread.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
